[兌] simplified/variant form of 悅.

[悅]
Phono-semantic compound ( 形聲 / 形声 , OC *lod, *lod ): semantic 忄 ( “ heart ” ) + phonetic 兌 ( OC *l'oːds ) .
Often written as 說 in pre-Qin texts.

[悦]
Phono-semantic compound ( 形聲 / 形声 ): semantic 忄 ( “ heart ” ) + phonetic 兌 ( OC *l'oːds ) . It expresses the meaning of being delighted. [ 1 ]
